notFound.title: Booking Not Found
notFound.desc: The booking code you entered wasn't found. Double-check the link or the booking code.

loadError: Failed to load booking status. Try reloading the page.

verify.title: Verify Your Booking
verify.desc: Enter the WhatsApp number you used when booking to see the full details.
verify.disclaimer: Full WhatsApp verification is coming soon.
verify.mismatch: The number doesn't match this booking's data. Please check your WhatsApp number again.

payment.title: Deposit Payment Instructions
payment.missing: The MUA hasn't set up payment info yet. Please contact the MUA directly.

detail.otpNotice: Full WhatsApp verification is coming soon (F08).

uploadForm.reuploadNote: Your previous proof was rejected by the MUA. Please double-check and re-upload.
uploadForm.fileLabel: Transfer Proof (JPG, PNG, WEBP, or PDF, max 5MB)
uploadForm.success: Payment proof uploaded successfully. Waiting for MUA verification.

errors.notFound: Booking not found or the WhatsApp number doesn't match. Try verifying again.
errors.conflict: The booking status has changed, upload can't continue.
errors.throttle: Too many upload attempts. Please try again shortly.
errors.generic: Failed to upload payment proof. Please try again.
